message: 🌱 Add openebs: [Pool Movement]Attaching the same disk from a old node to a mission (#690)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "openebs-2396-pool-movement-attaching-the-same-disk-from-a-old-node-to-a-new-node",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "openebs: [Pool Movement]Attaching the same disk from a old node to a new node should move the volumes.",
+    "description": "[Pool Movement]Attaching the same disk from a old node to a new node should move the volumes.. Requested by 1+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current openebs deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your openebs version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n openebs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openebs\nhelm list -n openebs 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working openebs installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review openebs configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant openebs configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n openebs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openebs\nkubectl get configmap -n openebs -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=openebs\n```\n## Description\nI have a cStor pool configured properly on one of the node and for some reason if this node goes bad , I should be able to put these disks on new functional nodes so that my volume also gets migrated successfully."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Pool Movement]Attaching the same disk from a old node to a",
+        "description": "This OEP contains the proposal to migrate the cStor pools from one node to another node upon changing the node selector on CSPC pool specs.\n\nThis OEP addresses the following issue: \nhttps://github.com/openebs/openebs/issues/2396\n**NOTE**: It should be performed only after migrating the underlying\n```yaml\nkubernetes.io/hostname: gke-kmova-helm-default-pool-252c03d1-6g64\n  uid: f50701b1-4b3c-11e9-8264-42010a80003a\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n openebs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openebs\nkubectl get events -n openebs --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[Pool Movement]Attaching the same disk from a old node to a\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This OEP contains the proposal to migrate the cStor pools from one node to another node upon changing the node selector on CSPC pool specs.\n\nThis OEP addresses the following issue: \nhttps://github.com/openebs/openebs/issues/2396\n**NOTE**: It should be performed only after migrating the underlying disks to new node.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "kubernetes.io/hostname: gke-kmova-helm-default-pool-252c03d1-6g64\n  uid: f50701b1-4b3c-11e9-8264-42010a80003a",
+        "NAME                                                              AGE\n  pvc-902875d9-4b3b-11e9-8264-42010a80003a-cstor-sparse-pool-le1j   15m\n  pvc-902875d9-4b3b-11e9-8264-42010a80003a-cstor-sparse-pool-p8hn   15m",
+        "apiVersion: openebs.io/v1alpha1\nkind: CStorVolumeReplica\nmetadata:\n  annotations:\n    cstorpool.openebs.io/hostname: gke-kmova-helm-default-pool-252c03d1-6g64\n  finalizers:\n  - cstorvolumereplica.openebs.io/finalizer\n  labels:\n    cstorpool.openebs.io/name: cstor-sparse-pool-f5bn\n    cstorpool.openebs.io/uid: f50701b1-4b3c-11e9-8264-42010a80003a\n    cstorvolume.openebs.io/name: pvc-902875d9-4b3b-11e9-8264-42010a80003a\n    openebs.io/cas-template-name: cstor-volume-create-default-0.8.1\n    openebs.io/persistent-volume: pvc-902875d9-4b3b-11e9-8264-42010a80003a\n    openebs.io/version: 0.8.1\n  name: pvc-902875d9-4b3b-11e9-8264-42010a80003a-cstor-sparse-pool-f5bn\n  namespace: openebs\nspec:\n  capacity: 4G\n  targetIP: 10.47.248.89\nstatus:\n  phase: Init"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "openebs",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "openebs"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",

+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/openebs/openebs/issues/2396",

+      "pr": "https://github.com/openebs/openebs/pull/3113"
+    },

+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },
